title: Treasure Adventure Game
description:
Treasure Adventure Game casts you in the role of a young boy who lands on an island that is a fragment of what was once a continent, destroyed in the war between a demon and a wizard. You accept quests, travel across the oceans, and generally have a bang-up time of being a little boy in a big world, out there looking for treasure and adventure. Your equipment consists of a hat, a parrot, and a boat that appears whenever you touch water. 

• Puzzle-platformer with a huge, open world to explore

• Meet mysterious other-worldy beings, and find multiple endings

• Diverse environments with changing weather and NPCs that are react accordingly

• Original music that changes with the background and creates an enchanting mood

Treasure Adventure World is an HD reimagining of Treasure Adventure Game:
description_short: Treasure Adventure Game casts you in the role of a young boy who lands on an island that is a fragment of what was once a continent, destroyed in the war between a demon and a wizard.
